summary: Completed comprehensive frontend Playwright testing of IAMS Vue 3 prototype (Paket 1). Verified auth/route guards, role-based menu, theme toggle, dashboard, assets/incidents/problems/users-roles/audit-logs tables, search/filter/pagination, edit dialogs, delete confirmation, MAC masking, 404, mobile responsiveness and storage security. 19 of 20 test scenarios pass. One UX bug found on mobile (sidebar does not auto-close after tapping a menu item).

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile sidebar does NOT auto-close after tapping a menu item. After clicking mobile-nav-assets at 375x800 viewport the URL navigates to /assets correctly, but the slide-out menu overlay remains visible covering content. The watch on route.fullPath -> ui.closeMobileSidebar() is either not firing or is being overridden. User must manually tap outside to close.

test_results_passed: Unauthenticated /dashboard redirects to /login?next=/dashboard
Wrong credentials show inline 'Email atau password tidak valid.' + toast 'Login gagal'
Demo Administrator quick-fill + Masuk -> /dashboard, toast 'Selamat datang! Login sebagai Administrator', sidebar shows all 6 items (dashboard, assets, incidents, problems, users-roles, audit-logs)
Logout from profile menu returns to /login
Operator role sidebar hides Users/Roles & Audit Logs (only 4 items)
Operator visiting /users-roles or /audit-logs via SPA navigation redirects to /dashboard (router guard working)
Profile dropdown Switch Role between Administrator/Operator updates sidebar items live (no re-login)
Theme toggle menu offers Light/Dark/System and applies dark class on <html>; iams-theme persisted in localStorage
Dashboard renders KPI cards (Total Aset 24, Incident Terbuka 8, Problem Aktif 5, Status Jaringan Degraded), distribution chart, status breakdown, recent incidents, recent activity
Assets page renders 8 rows on page 1, pagination Berikutnya/Sebelumnya works, page 3 reached
Assets search 'xyz123nothing' yields empty state
Reset filter button restores rows
Simulasi Error button shows ErrorState with 'Coba lagi' that reloads data
Edit pencil opens detail dialog with serial/PO/IP/MAC; MAC partially masked (e.g. **:**:**)
Delete trash opens ConfirmDialog with 'Hapus aset?'; Batal closes, Hapus aset removes row
Incidents page: 8 rows with severity & status badges visible
Problems page: 6 rows rendered
Users/Roles page: 2 rows with Administrator badge, status badges visible
Audit Logs page: 10 rows rendered
404 page renders for /random-non-existent-route with 'Kembali ke Dashboard' button and 404 text
Mobile (375x800): desktop sidebar hidden, hamburger [data-testid=mobile-menu-btn] opens mobile menu with 6 nav items
Storage security: localStorage only contains 'iams-remember' = {email}, sessionStorage empty. No token/password persisted
action_items: Fix mobile sidebar auto-close after nav tap. In DashboardLayout.vue, either change the watcher 'watch(() => route.fullPath, ...)' to 'watch(() => route.name, ...)' with immediate option, or add @click='ui.closeMobileSidebar()' directly on each mobile-nav button (line ~153). Currently after route change to /assets, ui.mobileSidebarOpen stays true so the overlay covers the page.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth state is purely in-memory (good for security: no token in storage). However, any full page reload (e.g. typing URL directly in address bar) silently kicks the user back to /login. If a refresh-friendly UX is desired without compromising security, consider an opaque session cookie or document the limitation in PRD. As-is, this is acceptable per the 'no token persistence' hard requirement.
DashboardLayout.vue is 288 lines and combines header, sidebar (desktop + mobile), and menu logic. Consider splitting Sidebar, Header, MobileSidebar into separate components for maintainability.

Window-level 'click' listener for closeAllMenus is correct but be aware that menus use `@click.stop`; any future contributor adding a new dropdown must also use data-menu-root + click.stop or it will close unexpectedly.
test_credentials: admin@iams.local/admin123 (Administrator), operator@iams.local/operator123 (Operator) - both verified working from /app/memory/test_credentials.md was empty, credentials taken from review request
seed_data_creation: None - all data is mocked in /app/frontend/src/data/*.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only prototype. Vue 3 + Vite on port 3000 via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Auth is in-memory Pinia store; iams-remember (email only) persisted. Theme persists via iams-theme key. Use [data-testid] selectors extensively. For mobile testing the hamburger testid is 'mobile-menu-btn' and items are 'mobile-nav-<name>'. Do NOT use page.goto() to test SPA route guards because full reload clears auth — use SPA-style navigation (history.pushState + popstate, or trigger clicks on rendered nav items).
rca of the issue: Mobile sidebar auto-close: watch(() => route.fullPath, () => ui.closeMobileSidebar()) is registered in DashboardLayout setup. After tapping mobile-nav-assets, the route DOES change (URL becomes /assets, Assets page renders), but the overlay remains. Possible RCAs: (1) Vue Router resolves the navigation but route.fullPath watcher may not re-fire because the overlay click triggers two state changes too fast and the watcher only triggers once with the same final value, OR (2) the watcher runs but a subsequent reactive update inside Pinia reverts it. Recommended mitigation: add explicit @click='ui.closeMobileSidebar()' on each mobile-nav button OR use router.afterEach hook in App.vue to call closeMobileSidebar.
